package rulefixtures

// scenario for map_of_slices_prealloc: `m[k] = append(m[k], v)` in loops without pre-allocating inner slices
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: info.
type Rule617NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario617Negative(records []Rule617NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
